Part.Source:
&LogGUID = GUID.NewGuid()
&Total = 10 &Count = 1 &Percentual = 0 &ProgressIni = serverNow() do 'Atualiza'
&IsAutoAlimentarKit = false For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedCliCod = PedCliCod
if LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida and (PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.OrdemCarregamento or PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.Amostra or PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.BalcaoVendas or PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.Faturamento or PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.PDV or PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.Televendas or PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.Vendas or PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.SMART or PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.Delivery)
&IsAutoAlimentarKit = true Endif
Exit EndFor
Do Case Case &NovoPedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO //ABRIR PEDIDO VENDA For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedCodOciRef = PedCodOciRef &OldPedSts = PedSts
PedDtaFic = PedDtaEms
If PedSts = &NovoPedSts return EndIf
If PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO EndIF
PedSts = &NovoPedSts &AuxPedDtaFat = PedDtaFat PedAplCom = 'S' //APLICAR COMISSAO
Exit EndFor Commit
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
do 'AtualizaUltimaVendaCliente'
CriticasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.Aberto, &wwpContextPesCod)
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
If &OldPedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO or &OldPedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO //ATUALIZA ESTOQUE AtualizaEstoqueEntradaSaida.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, Status_Pedido.ABERTO)
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
//ALIMENTA ESTOQUE KIT if &IsAutoAlimentarKit = true AutoAbasteceEstoqueProducao.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &wwpContextPesCod, &AuxPedDtaFat, &NovoPedSts) Endif Else AtualizaEstoqueEntradaSaida.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) EndIf
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
Case &NovoPedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO //SEPARA PEDIDO VENDA For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedCodOciRef = PedCodOciRef
if PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO PedSts = &NovoPedSts PedDtaSep = &PedDtaFat if PedDtaFat.IsEmpty() or PedDtaFat.IsNull() PedDtaFic = &PedDtaFat EndIF PedHorSep = serverTime() Endif
&AuxPedDtaFat = PedDtaFic
//PedFunCodSep = &SicFunCod EndFor commit
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
do 'AtualizaUltimaVendaCliente'
CriticasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.Separado, &wwpContextPesCod) &Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
//ATUALIZA ESTOQUE AtualizaEstoqueEntradaSaida.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) &Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
//ALIMENTA ESTOQUE KIT if &IsAutoAlimentarKit = true AutoAbasteceEstoqueProducao.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &wwpContextPesCod, &AuxPedDtaFat, &NovoPedSts) Endif
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
Case &NovoPedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO //FECHAR PEDIDO VENDA For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedCodOciRef = PedCodOciRef
If PedSts = &NovoPedSts return EndIf
&OldPedSts = PedSts
If PedSts <> &NovoPedSts PedSts = &NovoPedSts //FECHA PEDIDO PedDtaFat = &PedDtaFat //DATA FATURAMENTO PedHorFat = serverNow() PedDtaFic = &PedDtaFat EndIF
&AuxPedDtaFat = &PedDtaFat PedAplCom = 'S' //APLICAR COMISSAO
if PedStsFin <> Status_Financeiro.FECHADO if LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO else PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO Endif endif Endfor
Commit
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
do 'AtualizaUltimaVendaCliente'
CriticasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.Fechado, &wwpContextPesCod) &Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
//ATUALIZAPEDIDOVINCULADO if not &PedCodOciRef.IsEmpty() AtualizaVendaFutura.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCodOciRef, VendaFutura.BloqueiaVendaFutura) Endif
If &OldPedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO
//ATUALIZA ESTOQUE AtualizaEstoqueEntradaSaida.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, Status_Pedido.FECHADO)
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
//ALIMENTA ESTOQUE KIT If &IsAutoAlimentarKit = true AutoAbasteceEstoqueProducao.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &wwpContextPesCod, &AuxPedDtaFat, &NovoPedSts) Endif EndIF
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza' Case &NovoPedSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO //CANCELA VENDA
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedCodOciRef = PedCodOciRef If PedSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO return EndIf
PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO
PedSts = Status_Pedido.CANCELADO
&PedSerItmCod = PedSerItmCod Exit EndFor commit
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
do 'AtualizaUltimaVendaCliente'
CriticasPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, TipoCriticaPedido.Cancelado, &wwpContextPesCod)
if &PedSerItmCod > 0 prcAtualizaUltimaDataServico.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedSerItmCod) Endif
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
AtualizaEstoqueEntradaSaida.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO)
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza'
EndCase
IF &IsCancelarFinanceiro = TRUE CancelaStatusFinanceiroPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 'CANCELAMENTO DA VENDA, ABERTURA ESTOQUE PEDIDO', &wwpContextPesCod)
&Count += 1 If &Count > 0 &Percentual = round((&Count / &Total) * 100, 0) EndIF If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza' EndIf
PedNovStsCod_FORMULA.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod) if &PedCodOciRef <> 0 PedNovStsCod_FORMULA.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCodOciRef) Endif
&Percentual = 100 &ProgressFin = serverNow() do 'Atualiza'
Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew endfor
commit EndSub
sub 'AtualizaUltimaVendaCliente'
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon042_TrocarTransportadoraPadrao, &TrocarTransportadora)
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon139_TrocarVendedorPadrao, &TCon139_TrocarVendedorPadrao)
//ATUALIZA ULTIMA VENDA CLIENTE E VINCULOS &sdtVinculos = RetornaVinculos.Udp(&EmpCod, &PedCliCod)
PesUltVenDta_FORMULA.Call(&EmpCod, &sdtVinculos, &PesUltVenDta, &PesUltVenVlr, &PedTraRedCod, &PedTraSaiCod, &PesIntVenCod, &PesExtVenCod)
For &sdtVinculosItem in &sdtVinculos For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &sdtVinculosItem.PesCod Where PesIsCli = true
PesUltVenDta = &PesUltVenDta PesUltVenVlr = &PesUltVenVlr
If &PesIntVenCod <> 0 and &TCon139_TrocarVendedorPadrao <> 'N' PesIntVenCod = &PesIntVenCod EndIF
If &PesExtVenCod <> 0 and &TCon139_TrocarVendedorPadrao <> 'N' PesExtVenCod = &PesExtVenCod EndIF
if &PedTraRedCod <> 0 and &TrocarTransportadora = 'S' PesCliTraCod = &PedTraRedCod Endif if &PedTraSaiCod <> 0 and &TrocarTransportadora = 'S' PesCliTraSaiCod = &PedTraSaiCod EndIF
Exit EndFor EndFor Commit EndSub
Sub 'Exception_handler' GravaLogDevNew(&SolEmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'Exception_handler: &GXexceptionType',&GXexceptionType) GravaLogDevNew(&SolEmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'Exception_handler: &GXExceptionDetails',&GXExceptionDetails) GravaLogDevNew(&SolEmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'Exception_handler: &GXExceptionStack',&GXExceptionStack) Endsub
Sub 'Error_handler' GravaLogDevNew(&SolEmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'Error_handler: &Err',&Err.ToFormattedString()) GravaLogDevNew(&SolEmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'Error_handler: &gxDBErr',&gxDBErr.ToFormattedString()) GravaLogDevNew(&SolEmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'Error_handler: &GxDbSqlState',&GxDbSqlState) GravaLogDevNew(&SolEmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'Error_handler: &gxDBTxt',&gxDBTxt) GravaLogDevNew(&SolEmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'Error_handler: &gxOper',&gxOper) GravaLogDevNew(&SolEmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'Error_handler: &gxErrTbl',&gxErrTbl) GravaLogDevNew(&SolEmpCod,&LogGUID,&Pgmname,'Error_handler: &gxErrOpt',&gxErrOpt.ToFormattedString()) Endsub
